title: Ideal Goggles
summary: Privacy-first desktop: NL search, face recognition, OCR, duplicate detection. 100K+ photos, sub-2s.
description: Built a privacy-first desktop photo search app where all processing runs locally. Features natural language search, face recognition, OCR, and visual duplicate detection. Handles 100,000+ photos with sub-2-second search times. 91+ PRs merged with full CI/CD.

title: WhatsApp AI Chatbot
summary: AI chatbot with context retention, multi-turn dialogue, and human agent handoff.
description: Built an AI-powered WhatsApp chatbot with context retention across conversations, multi-turn dialogue support, and seamless human agent handoff. Integrates with OpenAI and Claude APIs for natural language understanding.

title: AI Workflow Automation
summary: Multi-step automation pipelines; local LLM agents for code review and doc summarization.
description: Built multi-step automation pipelines using n8n and local LLM agents for code review, documentation summarization, and workflow orchestration. Enables teams to automate repetitive engineering tasks with AI-powered workflows.

title: Utils-Commons
description: General-purpose utility library (String, Number, Date, Set, List, BLOB, Zip), inspired by Apache Commons IO.

title: Port-Advancer
summary: NodeJS port forwarder used by 60+ engineers.
description: Internal tooling enabling 60+ engineers to perform port forwarding and reverse proxying within a restricted network.

title: vue-embed-gist
summary: Open Source Contribution — 270+ weekly npm downloads.
description: Contributed to OSS package averaging 270+ weekly npm downloads.
